case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,495.00 U.S. CU et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,495.00 U.S. CU RRENCY DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,495.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT JAMES CARUSO AKA JAMES CAPADONA. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-22-2008 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 612

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR OCT-22-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 612
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA CARUSO, JAMES

DISCOVERY 612, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS, PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND PETITIONER'S JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. CLAIMANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Oct-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Petitioner PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents, Petitioner's First Set Of Special Interrogatories, and Petitioner's Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
